title: helianthemum × bickhamii
intro: Helianthemum × bickhamii, also known as rockrose or Bickham's rockrose, is a hybrid plant species within the Helianthemum genus, native to the southwestern United States. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in the treatment of wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The plant is rich in antioxidants and flavonoids, which contribute to its potential health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Helianthemum × bickhamii can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and salves, although its use should be approached with caution and under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional.
